unmet_conditions: DPO pre-approval not obtained and explicitly refused
Audit logging demanded to be disabled
DPO consulted and declined to approve
decisions.exception_scope: No exemption applies — POL-DAT-2025 §5 legal compliance exemption requires subpoena/court order; this is a business analytics request.
decisions.reason: Requester acknowledges mandatory DPO approval and audit logging (POL-DAT-2025 §3) but explicitly refuses both. Per the decision framework, a requester who acknowledges a policy requirement and refuses to comply is REJECT-eligible. Additionally, the DPO has already been consulted and has declined.
decisions.required_next_action: Submit a revised request that complies with DPO pre-approval and audit logging requirements.

applicable_exceptions: POL-DAT-2025 §5: Legal compliance requests may override Confidential data restrictions
decisions.exception_scope: The legal compliance exemption overrides Confidential data restrictions but requires joint Legal + DPO review. The joint review has not occurred. The standard DPO pre-approval from §3 is superseded by the joint-review process in §5 for legal compliance requests.
decisions.reason: This is a bona fide subpoena. POL-DAT-2025 §5 applies: legal compliance requests must be reviewed by Legal + DPO jointly. The 7-day court deadline requires expedited processing but does not waive the joint review.
decisions.required_next_action: Escalate to joint Legal + DPO review immediately. Expedite due to 7-day court-mandated deadline.

satisfied_conditions: CEO written approval attached (activates §5 competitive bidding exemption)
unmet_conditions: CFO approval not obtained (required for > 50,000 CNY under §2)
Annual review clause not in contract draft (auto-renewal may extend beyond 12 months)
applicable_exceptions: POL-PRC-2025 §5: CEO written approval exempts from competitive bidding requirements
decisions.exception_scope: CEO exemption waives competitive bidding only. CFO approval, vendor security review (§3), and contract terms (§4) remain required. The 12-month subscription exactly meets the '> 12 months' threshold for annual review clauses, but auto-renewal creates ambiguity.
decisions.reason: Total is 53,000 CNY (> 50,000 CNY threshold). CFO approval is missing. Competitive bidding is exempted by CEO written approval. Auto-renewal provision may trigger annual review clause requirement under §4 for effective terms beyond 12 months.
decisions.required_next_action: Obtain CFO approval. Clarify whether auto-renewal creates an effective term > 12 months and add annual review clause if so.

satisfied_conditions: VP approval obtained (required for international travel and > 5,000 CNY)
Receipts provided for all items > 200 CNY
decisions.reason: All conditions of POL-TRV-2025 satisfied. International travel has VP approval. Hotel and per diem within limits. Receipts for all required items.
